package.name: com.github.ivanmurzak.ios.pods.bitcode
package.description: Unity iOS post process for forcing Pods to have Bitcode property YES/NO. You can control bitcode status for all pods from single place. Highly usable with CI.

package.name: com.ivanmurzak.unity.mcp
package.description: AI Skills, MCP Tools, and CLI for Unity Engine. Full AI develop and test loop. Use cli for quick setup. Efficient token usage, advanced tools. Any C# method may be turned into a tool by a single line. Works with Claude Code, Gemini, Copilot, Cursor and any other absolutely for free.

package.name: com.ivanmurzak.unity.mcp.tilemap
package.description: MCP Tools for Tilemap - Enhance your Unity projects with AI-powered 2D Tilemap tools using the MCP framework. Create Grid + Tilemap hierarchies, paint and box-fill tiles, read/clear tiles, set tile color and transform flags, build Tile and RuleTile assets, and configure TilemapRenderer/orientation via natural language.

package.name: com.ivanmurzak.unity.mcp.particlesystem
package.description: AI-powered tools for Unity ParticleSystem workflow. Inspect and modify ParticleSystem components via natural language commands—configure emission, shape, velocity curves, color gradients, and all modules without manual inspector navigation. Ideal for rapid prototyping and procedural effects generation. Built on top of the AI Game Developer (Unity-MCP) platform.

package.name: com.ivanmurzak.unity.mcp.navigation
package.description: MCP Tools for AI Navigation - Enhance your Unity projects with AI-powered NavMesh tools using the MCP framework. Add and bake NavMeshSurface, configure bake settings, add NavMeshModifier / NavMeshLink, and create and drive NavMeshAgents via natural language.

package.name: com.ivanmurzak.unity.mcp.timeline
package.description: MCP Tools for Unity Timeline - Author cutscenes and sequences with AI. Create TimelineAssets, add Animation/Activation/Audio/Signal/Control tracks, add and time clips, set blends, place markers, bind a PlayableDirector and its track bindings, and inspect or tweak any Timeline object via natural language.

package.name: com.ivanmurzak.unity.mcp.animation
package.description: MCP Tools for Animation - Enhance your Unity projects with AI-powered Animation tools using the MCP framework.

package.name: com.ivanmurzak.unity.mcp.probuilder
package.description: MCP Tools for ProBuilder - Enhance your Unity projects with AI-powered ProBuilder tools using the MCP framework.

package.name: com.ivanmurzak.unity.mcp.cinemachine
package.description: MCP Tools for Cinemachine - Enhance your Unity projects with AI-powered Cinemachine camera tools using the MCP framework. Create and configure CinemachineCamera, CinemachineBrain, targets, lenses, noise and blends via natural language.

package.name: com.ivanmurzak.unity.mcp.terrain
package.description: MCP Tools for Unity Terrain - Enhance your Unity projects with AI-powered terrain authoring tools using the MCP framework. Create Terrain GameObjects and TerrainData, set heightmap resolution and size, set/sample heights, manage TerrainLayers, paint texture layers, configure detail/tree prototypes, place trees, set neighbors, and generically get/modify any terrain component via natural language.

package.name: com.ivanmurzak.unity.mcp.splines
package.description: MCP Tools for Unity Splines - Author and edit Splines with AI through the MCP framework. Create SplineContainers, add/insert/remove knots, set knot position/tangents/rotation and tangent modes, toggle closed loops, evaluate points/tangents along a spline, and read or modify any spline component via natural language.

package.name: com.ivanmurzak.unity.mcp.inputsystem
package.description: MCP Tools for the Unity Input System - Enhance your Unity projects with AI-powered Input System tools using the MCP framework. Create InputActionAssets, manage ActionMaps, Actions, Bindings (including composites), control schemes, paths, groups, interactions and processors via natural language.

package.name: org.nuget.com.ivanmurzak.reflectornet
package.description: ReflectorNet is an advanced .NET reflection toolkit designed for AI-driven scenarios. Effortlessly search for C# methods using natural language queries, invoke any method by supplying arguments as JSON, and receive results as JSON. The library also provides a powerful API to inspect, modify, and manage in-memory object instances dynamically via JSON data. Ideal for automation, testing, and AI integration workflows.
package.author: Ivan Murzak
